# Extracao: transcription_pdf_05-10X_Facebook_Posting_Checklist

- **Fonte:** transcription_pdf_05-10X_Facebook_Posting_Checklist.txt
- **Tipo:** TXT
- **Tamanho:** 0 MB

---

Determine post format (video, image, quiz, poll, etc.)
Create post description (if applicable)
Do a quality check of the following factors:
• Content is tailored for intended audience
• Content is useful, interesting, or engaging
• Content features a clear call to action
• Content is Facebook algorithm friendly
Tag any relevant users or pages (use sparingly)
Check-in to add location (optional)
Add a Feeling or Activity (optional)
Create a comment for links, “inspired by” tags, etc (optional)
Post during time of day to maximize reach
STANDARD POSTS
Prepare: To-dos before your live video
• Create basic outline for your talking points
• Optionally schedule as event in advance to announce
• Add headline and description to grab attention
• Check internet connection is strong and solid
• Ensure good lighting and minimal background noise
Perform: To-dos once you click “go live” button
• Welcome people and engage for first minute
• Have clear “starting” point for main content
• Invite people to like, comment, and share
• Always give a clear call to action at end
Complete: To-dos once you click “finish” to end live
• Trim beginning video for replay (optional)
• Post video as replay on newsfeed (important)
• Immediately react and reply to comments
• Share on profile or other social platforms (optional)
FACEBOOK LIVES
When complete… post and start engaging!
